title: Dynamic RPG Resource Bars
body:
# Dynamic RPG Resource Bars
          
This mod adds animated, RPG style resource bars on the HUD for health, stamina, and mana! ___ All bar sprites can be **replaced with a resource pack**, and tweaked using the built in **in-game editor with extensive customization**!  Or, you can simply use the default bars! The default bars are designed with a semi-vanilla medieval-fantasy feel, and are made to be consistent with the GUI resource pack used in the Medieval MC modpacks. **Looking to modify other parts of the hotbar?** Check out:  - [Fancy Hotbar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fancy-hotbar) - [SpiffyHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiffyhud) **General compatibility:** - [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful) and [Scorchful](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorchful), or other mods using Thermoo's temperature system, for health overlays - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) (saturation overlay, health/hunger restore flashing) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) (health/hunger overlays) - [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment) (blood bar for vampires) **Mana Mods supported:** - [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) (1.20.1 Forge, 1.21.1 Neoforge) - [Iron's Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) (1.20.1 Forge, 1.21.1 Neoforge) - [RPGMana](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpgmana) and [Arch-RPGMana](https://modrinth.com/mod/arch-rpgmana/versions) (1.20.1 Fabric) - [Mana Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mana-attributes) (1.21.1 Fabric) **Stamina Mods supported:** - None yet - By default, the bar shows for Hunger. Planned: Stamina Attributes, Paragliders Soft incompatibilities: - **Leave my Bars Alone**, **Horseman**. Dynamic Resource Bars will always replace hunger with mount health, regardless of if these mods are loaded. This may change in the future.
